# Agent Instruction Effectiveness Probe

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/integrationmatrix -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to provider integration matrix](../integration-matrix.md)

Provider instruction effectiveness is separate from deterministic prompt placement.

Public CI verifies placement with `go test ./internal/agentbridge`, without launching provider CLIs.

Real provider evidence is opt-in and must use the same harness:

1. Build the provider-specific probe with `BuildInstructionEffectivenessProbe`.
2. Send the generated prompt/system prompt through the provider adapter's normal integration path.
3. Validate the provider output with `ValidateInstructionEffectivenessOutput`.
4. Record missing executable or missing authentication as a skip only before the provider roundtrip starts.

| Provider | Probe marker | Expected instruction surface |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Claude Code | `RIIDO_INSTRUCTION_ACK:claude` | `system-prompt` |
| Codex | `RIIDO_INSTRUCTION_ACK:codex` | `prompt prefix` |
| OpenClaw | `RIIDO_INSTRUCTION_ACK:openclaw` | `system-prompt-inline` |
| Cursor Agent | `RIIDO_INSTRUCTION_ACK:cursor` | `prompt prefix` |
